languages.text: "Фиксирую рост риска проблем легитимации. Фиксирую изменение статуса субъекта {name} фон Валанциуc". {n}Паскаль дарит вам долгий, полный тяжести взгляд, затем его вокс шелестит:{/n} "Предполагаю, что это и так очевидно, но: меры безопасности данного объекта понижены в статусе до "ненадежные".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Фиксирую рост риска проблем легитимации. Фиксирую изменение статуса субъекта {name} фон Валанциус. Высылаю прошение о пересмотре взаимоотношений между единицей Паскаль Ханейманн и династией фон Валанциус".

"Фиксирую рост риска проблем легитимации. Фиксирую изменение статуса субъекта {name} фон Валанциуc". {n}Паскаль дарит вам долгий, полный тяжести взгляд, затем его вокс шелестит:{/n} "Предполагаю, что это и так очевидно, но: меры безопасности данного объекта понижены в статусе до "ненадежные".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую рост риска проблем легитимации. Фиксирую изменение статуса субъекта {name} фон Валанциуc". {n}Паскаль дарит вам долгий, полный тяжести взгляд, затем его вокс шелестит:{/n} "Предполагаю, что это и так очевидно, но: меры безопасности данного объекта понижены в статусе до "ненадежные".

traits.locale_text: "I register an increased risk of legitimation complications. I register an altered status designation for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal bestows upon you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy'."

"I register an increased risk of legitimation complications. I register an altered status designation for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal bestows upon you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy'."

"I register an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. I also register a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

"I register an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

languages.text: «Registrado aumento del riesgo de complicaciones relacionadas con la legitimidad. Además, registrado cambio de estado para el sujeto {name} von Valancius». {n}Pasqal te mira largo y tendido, y el voco vuelve a chirriar.{/n} «Supongo que esta observación es evidente, pero el protocolo me obliga a expresarla: es necesario cambiar la designación de seguridad de esta instalación a "indigna de confianza"».
languages.original_text: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

traits.locale_text: «Registrado aumento del riesgo de complicaciones relacionadas con la legitimidad. Además, registrado cambio de estado para el sujeto {name} von Valancius». {n}Pasqal te mira largo y tendido, y el voco vuelve a chirriar.{/n} «Supongo que esta observación es evidente, pero el protocolo me obliga a expresarla: es necesario cambiar la designación de seguridad de esta instalación a "indigna de confianza"».

languages.text: “记录到合法性遭遇意外风险的概率上升。记录到主体{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯的状态发生变更。”{n}帕斯卡向你投来长久而沉甸甸的注视，随即他的音阵发出刺耳的嘶响。{/n}“我假定此观测结论不言自明，然而规程要求必须如实陈述：本设施的安全分级自即刻起修正为‘不可信任’。”
languages.original_text: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

traits.locale_text: “记录到合法性遭遇意外风险的概率上升。记录到主体{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯的状态发生变更。”{n}帕斯卡向你投来长久而沉甸甸的注视，随即他的音阵发出刺耳的嘶响。{/n}“我假定此观测结论不言自明，然而规程要求必须如实陈述：本设施的安全分级自即刻起修正为‘不可信任’。”

languages.text: « Enregistrement d'un accroissement des risques de complications liées à la légitimité {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. À noter également : modification du statut du sujet {name} von Valancius. » {n}Pasqal vous adresse un long regard chargé de sens, puis son vox se met à crisser.{/n} « J'imagine que cette observation va de soi, cependant le protocole exige sa formulation : le niveau de sécurité de ce complexe passe à "non fiable". »
languages.original_text: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

traits.locale_text: « Enregistrement d'un accroissement des risques de complications liées à la légitimité {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. À noter également : modification du statut du sujet {name} von Valancius. » {n}Pasqal vous adresse un long regard chargé de sens, puis son vox se met à crisser.{/n} « J'imagine que cette observation va de soi, cependant le protocole exige sa formulation : le niveau de sécurité de ce complexe passe à "non fiable". »

languages.text: "Meşruiyet komplikasyonları riskinde artış kaydediyorum. Ayrıca {name} von Valancius öznesinin statüsünde bir değişiklik kaydediyorum." {n}Pasqal sana uzun, ağır bir bakış atıyor. Ardından voksu gıcırdıyor.{/n} "Bu gözlemin apaçık ortada olduğunu varsayıyorum ancak, protokol dile getirilmesini talep ediyor: Bu tesisin güvenlik sınıflandırması, 'güvenilmez' olarak revize edilmiştir."
languages.original_text: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

traits.locale_text: "Meşruiyet komplikasyonları riskinde artış kaydediyorum. Ayrıca {name} von Valancius öznesinin statüsünde bir değişiklik kaydediyorum." {n}Pasqal sana uzun, ağır bir bakış atıyor. Ardından voksu gıcırdıyor.{/n} "Bu gözlemin apaçık ortada olduğunu varsayıyorum ancak, protokol dile getirilmesini talep ediyor: Bu tesisin güvenlik sınıflandırması, 'güvenilmez' olarak revize edilmiştir."

languages.text: "Registriere ein erhöhtes Risiko für Komplikationen hinsichtlich der Legitimierung. Registriere einen veränderten Status für das Subjekt {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal sieht dich lange an, ehe sein Vox zu knistern beginnt.{/n} "Ich halte diese Beobachtung für offensichtlich, aber das Protokoll verlangt ihre Artikulierung: die Sicherheitsstufe dieser Einrichtung wird hiermit auf 'nicht vertrauenswürdig' revidiert."
languages.original_text: "Registering an increased risk of complications of legitimacy. Registering a change in status for the subject {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal gives you a long, weighty stare, then his vox rasps.{/n} "I assume this observation to be self-evident, yet protocol demands its utterance: the security classification of this facility is hereby revised to 'untrustworthy.'"

traits.locale_text: "Registriere ein erhöhtes Risiko für Komplikationen hinsichtlich der Legitimierung. Registriere einen veränderten Status für das Subjekt {name} von Valancius." {n}Pasqal sieht dich lange an, ehe sein Vox zu knistern beginnt.{/n} "Ich halte diese Beobachtung für offensichtlich, aber das Protokoll verlangt ihre Artikulierung: die Sicherheitsstufe dieser Einrichtung wird hiermit auf 'nicht vertrauenswürdig' revidiert."

languages.text: "正統性の合併症のリスク増加を登録。{name} フォン・ヴァランシウスのステータスを変更しました。"{n}パスカールは長く、重みのある視線をあなたに送り、そして彼のヴォックスが唸る。{/n}この観察結果は自明であると思うが、規約上、これを公表する必要がある：この施設のセキュリティ分類を "信頼できない "に変更する。
